response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with broad full-stack, embedded, and desktop experience, but their core stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. The role demands deep JVM expertise with Java, Kotlin, and the Spring ecosystem, none of which are central to this profile. Java appears only peripherally (robotic arms, a mobile orchestration tool) and Kotlin/Spring/Hibernate/Quarkus are entirely absent. The C/C++ IDE work at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI) is the most relevant signal, showing genuine IDE-internals exposure, but it does not offset the missing JVM-ecosystem foundation this position requires.
strengths: Direct IDE-internals experience building C/C++ components for a commercial C IDE
Long, senior track record across complex, large-scale and low-latency systems
concerns: No Kotlin and no Spring/Hibernate/Quarkus enterprise-framework experience
Java is only peripheral; no demonstrated deep JVM expertise
Primary recent stack (TypeScript/Node, DLang) is off-target for the role
